runtime_create_session.name: runtime_create_session
runtime_create_session.description: Create a disposable E2B Worker Sandbox session for isolated code execution

timeoutMs.description: Optional worker session timeout in milliseconds

taskLabel.description: Optional label or short task description

runtime_list_sessions.name: runtime_list_sessions
runtime_list_sessions.description: List all active and recent worker runtime sessions owned by this controller

runtime_get_session.name: runtime_get_session
runtime_get_session.description: Retrieve state and lifecycle information for a specific runtime session

runtime_run_command.name: runtime_run_command
runtime_run_command.description: Execute a terminal command inside the specified worker sandbox restricted to /workspace

timeoutMs.description: Optional command execution timeout in milliseconds

runtime_destroy_session.name: runtime_destroy_session
runtime_destroy_session.description: Idempotently kill and destroy a worker sandbox session

sessionId.description: Opaque runtime session ID to destroy

runtime_destroy_all_sessions.name: runtime_destroy_all_sessions
runtime_destroy_all_sessions.description: Emergency operation: Destroy all active worker sandbox sessions owned by this controller

confirm.description: Set to true to explicitly confirm destroying all active sessions

repository_bind.name: repository_bind
repository_bind.description: Bind an active Worker session to one authorized GitHub repository.

baseBranch.description: Optional base branch name. Defaults to repository default branch.

repository_clone.name: repository_clone
repository_clone.description: Clone the bound repository base branch into /workspace/repository inside the Worker Sandbox.

repository_inspect.name: repository_inspect
repository_inspect.description: Return a concise structured repository summary of branches, HEAD, clean/dirty state, manifests, and governance files.

repository_read_file.name: repository_read_file
repository_read_file.description: Read content of a file inside /workspace/repository with path traversal safety and line range support.

repository_write_file.name: repository_write_file
repository_write_file.description: Write content to a file inside /workspace/repository safely.

repository_apply_patch.name: repository_apply_patch
repository_apply_patch.description: Apply a unified diff patch to files in /workspace/repository.

git_create_branch.name: git_create_branch
git_create_branch.description: Create a local feature branch from the recorded base SHA.

git_status.name: git_status
git_status.description: Get structured Git status (staged, unstaged, untracked, clean).

git_diff.name: git_diff
git_diff.description: Get bounded Git diff for working tree, staged changes, or base branch comparison.

git_commit.name: git_commit
git_commit.description: Create a local Git commit from explicitly staged file paths.

validation_record.name: validation_record
validation_record.description: Record executed validation commands (tests, lint, build, etc.) for preflight correlation.

github_preflight_publish.name: github_preflight_publish
github_preflight_publish.description: Verify repository status, clean worktree, secret scanning, base branch drift, and validation records prior to branch publication.

github_publish_branch.name: github_publish_branch
github_publish_branch.description: Publish the local feature branch to GitHub using short-lived installation access token.

github_prepare_pr_handoff.name: github_prepare_pr_handoff
github_prepare_pr_handoff.description: Generate structured PR handoff metadata for ChatGPT official GitHub connector to create Pull Request.

agent_runtime_info.name: agent_runtime_info
agent_runtime_info.description: Get runtime version, template version, skills pack version, and operating security mode.

agent_list_skills.name: agent_list_skills
agent_list_skills.description: List all available runtime skills with descriptions and content hashes.

agent_load_skill.name: agent_load_skill
agent_load_skill.description: Load full or bounded content of a specific runtime skill.

skillName.description: Name of the skill to load (e.g. tool-routing, pr-creation)

agent_get_workflow.name: agent_get_workflow
agent_get_workflow.description: Get structured workflow definition by name.

workflowName.description: Name of the workflow (e.g. feature-to-pr, bug-fix-to-pr)

agent_get_operating_instructions.name: agent_get_operating_instructions
agent_get_operating_instructions.description: Get operating handbook instructions for the Worker Sandbox session.

coding_workspace_get.name: coding_workspace_get
coding_workspace_get.description: Get detailed state of an active coding workspace.

terminal_read.name: terminal_read
terminal_read.description: Read incremental terminal output from PTY using cursor.

terminal_list.name: terminal_list
terminal_list.description: List all active terminal sessions for a workspace.

workspace_list_ports.name: workspace_list_ports
workspace_list_ports.description: Detect listening dev server ports and preview URLs inside the Worker Sandbox.

coding_workspace_start.name: coding_workspace_start
coding_workspace_start.description: Start a new temporary coding workspace with repo clone, feature branch, bootstrap, and optional PTY.

terminal_open.name: terminal_open
terminal_open.description: Open a new persistent interactive PTY shell inside the Worker Sandbox.

terminal_exec.name: terminal_exec
terminal_exec.description: Run a deterministic one-shot command inside the Worker Sandbox.

terminal_write.name: terminal_write
terminal_write.description: Send input string or control characters to an active PTY.

input.description: Input string to send to PTY

terminal_send_signal.name: terminal_send_signal
terminal_send_signal.description: Send safe signal (SIGINT, SIGTERM, SIGHUP, SIGWINCH) to PTY process.

coding_workspace_destroy.name: coding_workspace_destroy
coding_workspace_destroy.description: Destroy active coding workspace and terminate all associated processes and sandboxes.

confirm.description: Must set to true to confirm destruction

coding_task_start.name: coding_task_start
coding_task_start.description: Starts a new coding task in an existing Phase 4 workspace.

coding_task_get.name: coding_task_get
coding_task_get.description: Retrieves detailed state and summary of a coding task.

repository_intelligence_scan.name: repository_intelligence_scan
repository_intelligence_scan.description: Intelligently scans the workspace repository structure, manifests, and commands.

repository_intelligence_get.name: repository_intelligence_get
repository_intelligence_get.description: Gets a specific section of the repository intelligence report.

section.description: Section name (overview, structure, commands, tests, etc.)

repository_search.name: repository_search
repository_search.description: Searches file content using safe ripgrep within the bound repository.

repository_find_files.name: repository_find_files
repository_find_files.description: Finds files matching patterns within the repository.

repository_symbol_search.name: repository_symbol_search
repository_symbol_search.description: Searches for code symbols (functions, classes, interfaces) with confidence rating.

coding_plan_set.name: coding_plan_set
coding_plan_set.description: Sets or updates the structured plan for a coding task.

coding_plan_update_step.name: coding_plan_update_step
coding_plan_update_step.description: Updates the status and evidence references for a step in the task plan.

coding_plan_get.name: coding_plan_get
coding_plan_get.description: Gets the current plan for a coding task.

execution_record_command.name: execution_record_command
execution_record_command.description: Associates a terminal execution with a task as official evidence.

execution_list_evidence.name: execution_list_evidence
execution_list_evidence.description: Lists recorded execution evidence for a task.

validation_plan_detect.name: validation_plan_detect
validation_plan_detect.description: Proposes validation commands based on repository intelligence and modified paths.

validation_cycle_start.name: validation_cycle_start
validation_cycle_start.description: Starts a new validation cycle for a task.

validation_cycle_complete.name: validation_cycle_complete
validation_cycle_complete.description: Completes a validation cycle using recorded execution evidence.

validation_get_status.name: validation_get_status
validation_get_status.description: Gets the current validation status and repair budget for a task.

failure_classify.name: failure_classify
failure_classify.description: Classifies execution failure into stable failure categories and signature.

repair_attempt_start.name: repair_attempt_start
repair_attempt_start.description: Starts a bounded repair attempt following a failed validation cycle.

repair_attempt_complete.name: repair_attempt_complete
repair_attempt_complete.description: Completes a repair attempt and records changed files.

coding_checkpoint_create.name: coding_checkpoint_create
coding_checkpoint_create.description: Creates a compact, sanitized checkpoint of current task progress.

coding_checkpoint_get.name: coding_checkpoint_get
coding_checkpoint_get.description: Gets details of a task checkpoint.

coding_checkpoint_list.name: coding_checkpoint_list
coding_checkpoint_list.description: Lists checkpoint metadata for a task.

coding_task_resume.name: coding_task_resume
coding_task_resume.description: Resumes a task from a checkpoint with drift detection.

coding_diff_review.name: coding_diff_review
coding_diff_review.description: Reviews working tree git diff, unplanned files, secret findings, and scope expansion.

coding_completion_gate.name: coding_completion_gate
coding_completion_gate.description: Evaluates all completion gates before Phase 3 publication preflight.

coding_pr_handoff_prepare.name: coding_pr_handoff_prepare
coding_pr_handoff_prepare.description: Prepares a structured Pull Request handoff markdown document.

coding_task_abandon.name: coding_task_abandon
coding_task_abandon.description: Abandons a coding task with explicit confirmation.

confirm.description: Must be true to confirm abandonment

workspace_preview_resolve.name: workspace_preview_resolve
workspace_preview_resolve.description: Resolves application port to internal localhost and optional E2B preview URL

browser_session_open.name: browser_session_open
browser_session_open.description: Opens an isolated Playwright Chromium session for a workspace

browser_session_get.name: browser_session_get
browser_session_get.description: Retrieves state and summary for a browser session

browser_session_close.name: browser_session_close
browser_session_close.description: Closes a browser session and cleans up resources

browser_page_new.name: browser_page_new
browser_page_new.description: Creates a new isolated page in an existing browser session

browser_page_close.name: browser_page_close
browser_page_close.description: Closes a specific page in a browser session

browser_navigate.name: browser_navigate
browser_navigate.description: Navigates a page to a target URL or preview path with security checks

browser_snapshot.name: browser_snapshot
browser_snapshot.description: Captures a bounded structured snapshot of visible page content and locators

browser_click.name: browser_click
browser_click.description: Clicks an element identified by accessible locator or elementRef

browser_fill.name: browser_fill
browser_fill.description: Fills a form field with secret redaction for sensitive fields

browser_press.name: browser_press
browser_press.description: Presses a keyboard key on the active element or page

browser_select_option.name: browser_select_option
browser_select_option.description: Selects one or more options in an HTML select control

browser_check.name: browser_check
browser_check.description: Checks or unchecks a checkbox or radio button control

browser_upload_file.name: browser_upload_file
browser_upload_file.description: Uploads files restricted strictly to active workspace paths

browser_wait_for.name: browser_wait_for
browser_wait_for.description: Waits for a condition (element, text, network idle, title match, or delay)

browser_assert.name: browser_assert
browser_assert.description: Runs a structured UI assertion on real browser state and generates evidence

browser_screenshot.name: browser_screenshot
browser_screenshot.description: Captures a page screenshot and saves it to controlled artifact storage

browser_console_read.name: browser_console_read
browser_console_read.description: Reads sanitized console log entries with cursor pagination

browser_page_errors_read.name: browser_page_errors_read
browser_page_errors_read.description: Reads uncaught page errors with sanitized stack traces

browser_network_read.name: browser_network_read
browser_network_read.description: Reads network metadata and HTTP failure logs with query/header secret redaction

browser_trace_start.name: browser_trace_start
browser_trace_start.description: Starts recording a Playwright trace in the browser context

browser_trace_stop.name: browser_trace_stop
browser_trace_stop.description: Stops tracing and saves a trace zip archive to controlled artifact storage

browser_accessibility_scan.name: browser_accessibility_scan
browser_accessibility_scan.description: Runs a local accessibility scan on page content using axe-core

browser_failure_classify.name: browser_failure_classify
browser_failure_classify.description: Classifies browser/UI failure into distinct failure categories with suggested inspection actions

browser_verification_cycle_start.name: browser_verification_cycle_start
browser_verification_cycle_start.description: Starts a browser verification cycle bound to a Phase 5 task and current head SHA

browser_verification_cycle_complete.name: browser_verification_cycle_complete
browser_verification_cycle_complete.description: Completes a browser verification cycle and evaluates evidence freshness

browser_verification_get.name: browser_verification_get
browser_verification_get.description: Retrieves browser verification state and evidence freshness for a task

artifact_list.name: artifact_list
artifact_list.description: Lists metadata for browser artifacts in a workspace

artifact_get_metadata.name: artifact_get_metadata
artifact_get_metadata.description: Gets detailed metadata for a browser artifact

artifact_create_download_url.name: artifact_create_download_url
artifact_create_download_url.description: Generates a short-lived pre-signed download URL for a browser artifact

artifact_delete.name: artifact_delete
artifact_delete.description: Deletes a browser artifact with explicit confirmation

github_pr_attach.name: github_pr_attach
github_pr_attach.description: Attach a coding task to one existing Pull Request and record base/head SHAs.

github_pr_get.name: github_pr_get
github_pr_get.description: Retrieve bounded Pull Request metadata and status.

github_pr_list_files.name: github_pr_list_files
github_pr_list_files.description: List files changed in the Pull Request with pagination and patch excerpts.

github_pr_list_review_threads.name: github_pr_list_review_threads
github_pr_list_review_threads.description: List all review threads and comments associated with the Pull Request.

github_pr_get_review_thread.name: github_pr_get_review_thread
github_pr_get_review_thread.description: Get full comments and line mappings for one review thread.

github_pr_classify_feedback.name: github_pr_classify_feedback
github_pr_classify_feedback.description: Classify the Pull Request review feedback and identify paths requiring repair.

github_pr_list_checks.name: github_pr_list_checks
github_pr_list_checks.description: List check runs and statuses for the exact HEAD SHA of the Pull Request.

github_pr_list_workflow_runs.name: github_pr_list_workflow_runs
github_pr_list_workflow_runs.description: List Actions workflow runs for the exact HEAD SHA.

github_pr_get_ci_failure_evidence.name: github_pr_get_ci_failure_evidence
github_pr_get_ci_failure_evidence.description: Fetch structured failed check annotations and bounded redacted log excerpts.

github_pr_repair_workspace_start.name: github_pr_repair_workspace_start
github_pr_repair_workspace_start.description: Clone Pull Request head branch and reconstruct E2B Worker sandbox.

github_pr_repair_plan_set.name: github_pr_repair_plan_set
github_pr_repair_plan_set.description: Configure and validate a bounded repair plan inside the coding task.

github_pr_repair_cycle_start.name: github_pr_repair_cycle_start
github_pr_repair_cycle_start.description: Start a single bounded repair cycle with specific hypothesis.

github_pr_repair_cycle_complete.name: github_pr_repair_cycle_complete
github_pr_repair_cycle_complete.description: Complete the current repair cycle and assert git file updates.

github_pr_repair_diff_review.name: github_pr_repair_diff_review
github_pr_repair_diff_review.description: Review the complete difference between original PR head and current local repair head.

github_pr_repair_preflight.name: github_pr_repair_preflight
github_pr_repair_preflight.description: Run full preflight checks ensuring fast-forward safety before pushing branch.

github_pr_push_repair.name: github_pr_push_repair
github_pr_push_repair.description: Push only fast-forward updates to the existing Pull Request branch (approval-gated external write).

github_pr_refresh_ci.name: github_pr_refresh_ci
github_pr_refresh_ci.description: Poll CI check status and workflow runs for the new head SHA.

github_pr_prepare_review_responses.name: github_pr_prepare_review_responses
github_pr_prepare_review_responses.description: Draft proposed comments replying to resolved review threads.

github_pr_post_review_response.name: github_pr_post_review_response
github_pr_post_review_response.description: Post thread comment replies on GitHub Pull Request threads (approval-gated external write).

github_pr_prepare_final_handoff.name: github_pr_prepare_final_handoff
github_pr_prepare_final_handoff.description: Construct the final verification handoff summary.

runtime_system_status.name: runtime_system_status
runtime_system_status.description: Retrieve Remote MCP Controller health, DB status, active sessions, and job health

runtime_capacity_status.name: runtime_capacity_status
runtime_capacity_status.description: Retrieve limits, resource capacities, and soft/hard quota usage

runtime_incident_snapshot.name: runtime_incident_snapshot
runtime_incident_snapshot.description: Retrieve a list of recent system errors and operational failures (sanitized of secrets)
